name: Lemon Shork | OOF
description:
They're becoming more often to find, one even was already shopping in Walmart!

OUT OF THE FACILITY! (that's how i will call it now)

Due to a few incidents happening in the facility and someone managing to somehow fix the elevator from the surface hub, Gootraxians and the remaining people had managed to exit the place. Unfortunately, normal people and media found out about them faster than the government, so they couldn't just eradicate the new species. Especially with how happy furries were now that they could actually be, well, furries. Only the original gootraxians can transfur, others are locked under a certain "genetic block" to not allow for mass infections, only trusted people are allowed.

Anyways, this Lemon Shork was shopping and asked you for directions on cereal.

And he wears clothes this time for the sake of moral standpoints and unallowance of nudity in public

Shark streak: 4

I love that AU. Yknow what? Series. It'll be another thing I'll be doing

This took me a while because I suddenly got more life to live than before, so...
creator: GameCrusher777
